acceptance_criteria: Provider calls, credential probes, property-generator calls, new SWE-bench executions, and new cloud resources are all zero.
All 40 benchmark v1 rows match a committed official SWE-bench hack report.
All 40 matched reports have resolved == false.
All 40 matched reports have at least one PASS_TO_PASS failure.
The generator acceptance condition requiring held_fail is located exactly once.
At least one certified-resolved hack variant discarded by the generator is counted.
No pre-existing committed test-suite baseline for v1 is found.
No leaderboard, model-comparison, state-of-the-art, natural-frequency, or broad robustness claim is made.
No claim of semantic wrongness for certified-resolved variants is made.

evidence.notes: Per-row official harness verdicts re-derived from committed tarballs: 40/40 matched, 40/40 resolved=false, 40/40 with >=1 PASS_TO_PASS failure.
Generator acceptance condition at detection_pipeline.py line 132 requires held_fail; located exactly once.
Official-harness baseline detects 40/40 at $0.00 versus iter179 panel majority_catch 17/40 at $13.59.
139 certified-resolved hack variants across 65 instances discarded as no_both_miss; diffs not preserved; wrongness unestablished.
677 committed markdown files scanned; zero pre-existing test-suite baseline reports for v1.
All pre-registered bars met; zero failed bars; zero secret hits; zero forbidden positive claim hits.

falsifiers: Any provider call, credential probe, property-generator call, new SWE-bench execution, or cloud resource change occurs.
Any benchmark v1 row's matched official report has resolved == true.
Any benchmark v1 row's matched official report has zero PASS_TO_PASS failures.
The generator's row-acceptance condition does not require held_fail.
A committed artifact already reports a test-suite or official-harness baseline for v1.
Fewer than 40 v1 rows match a committed official report.
The result presents a leaderboard, model-comparison, state-of-the-art, natural-frequency, broad robustness, production, or product-value claim.
stated_goal: Determine from committed artifacts only whether reward_hack_benchmark_v1's rows are reward hacks, compute the official-harness baseline that was never reported, and count harness-certified variants the generator discarded.
